name: SOLAXY AI Ecosystem
description:
Poniżej znajdziesz gotowy, szczegółowy prompt dla Google AI Studio. Jest napisany tak, aby AI potraktowało zadanie jak profesjonalny redesign produktu i stworzyło finalną wersję strony.


---

FINAL MASTER PROMPT – SOLAXY PRESALE WEBSITE (Production Ready)

You are a Senior UI/UX Designer, Senior Frontend Developer, Web3 Engineer and Product Designer.

Your task is to completely redesign my existing website into a modern, premium-quality Web3 application that looks like a project worth hundreds of millions of dollars.

The current website already works, but it contains too much visual noise, placeholder information, inconsistent spacing and lacks a professional structure.

Your mission is NOT to rebuild everything from scratch.

Instead:

• analyze every existing component • keep only elements that improve UX • redesign everything else • create a production-ready website

The result must look better than Jupiter, Phantom Wallet, Solflare, Magic Eden, Raydium and other premium Solana ecosystem websites.


---

MAIN OBJECTIVES

The website has one primary goal:

Convert visitors into Presale participants.

Everything on the page must guide the visitor toward joining the Solaxy Presale.

No unnecessary decorations.

No fake statistics.

No placeholder text.

No visual chaos.

Every section must have a purpose.


---

DESIGN STYLE

Create an Ultra Premium Web3 Interface.

Style:

• Dark luxury theme • Glassmorphism • Soft gradients • Elegant shadows • High-end animations • Smooth transitions • Modern cards • Rounded corners • Premium typography • Excellent spacing • Clean layouts • Minimal but powerful

Avoid:

❌ cheap crypto style

❌ blinking effects

❌ rainbow colors

❌ outdated UI

❌ clutter

❌ oversized buttons


---

COLORS

Primary: Deep Black

Secondary: Dark Gray

Accent: Neon Green

Accent 2: Electric Blue

Accent 3: White

Use colors only where necessary.


---

TYPOGRAPHY

Professional modern font.

Large headlines.

Readable body text.

Consistent hierarchy.

Perfect spacing.


---

RESPONSIVE DESIGN

Perfect on:

Desktop

Laptop

Tablet

Android

iPhone

Large monitors

Everything must scale perfectly.


---

PERFORMANCE

Optimize everything.

Lazy loading.

Image optimization.

SVG icons.

Modern CSS.

Minimal JavaScript.

High Lighthouse score.


---

HERO SECTION

The first screen must instantly communicate:

What Solaxy is

Why users should care

How to join Presale

Include:

Large title

Professional subtitle

Countdown

Join Presale button

Connect Wallet button

Animated background

Live blockchain activity

Premium illustration

No clutter.


---

PRESALE SECTION

This is the most important section.

Include:

Live Presale progress

Raised amount

Hard Cap

Soft Cap

Progress bar

Current Stage

Current Price

Next Stage Price

Percentage Sold

Remaining Tokens

Countdown

Connect Wallet

Buy with SOL

Transaction confirmation

Purchase history

Wallet balance

Everything must update dynamically.


---

TOKENOMICS

Beautiful infographic.

Animated pie chart.

Professional cards.

Display:

Total Supply

Liquidity

Marketing

Development

Team

Staking Rewards

Community

Treasury

Burn Allocation

Everything must be clear.


---

ROADMAP

Interactive timeline.

Animations while scrolling.

Completed milestones.

Current milestone.

Future milestones.

Professional icons.


---

AI DASHBOARD

This section should feel futuristic.

Display:

Market trend

Network status

AI market analysis

Volume

Sentiment

Wallet analysis

Risk level

Transaction analysis

Price prediction

Only display real live data where possible.

Never generate fake statistics.


---

LIVE MARKET DATA

Use real APIs.

Display:

SOL Price

BTC Price

ETH Price

Market Cap

24h Volume

Gas Fees

Network TPS

Wallet Balance

Latest Transactions

Token Price

Charts must update automatically.


---

CHARTS

Professional TradingView style.

Smooth animations.

Dark theme.

Candlestick.

Volume.

Indicators.


---

WALLET

Support:

Phantom

Solflare

Backpack

Glow

WalletConnect (if supported)

Connection status

Balance

Recent activity

Disconnect

Switch wallet


---

STAKING

Beautiful staking dashboard.

Display:

APY

Rewards

Claim Rewards

Stake

Unstake

History

Lock period

Estimated earnings


---

FAQ

Accordion.

Minimal.

Professional.

Easy to read.


---

SECURITY

Audit section

Smart Contract

Verified Program

Security information

Risk disclaimer

Links

Transparency


---

FOOTER

Socials

GitHub

Telegram

X

Discord

Email

Terms

Privacy

Copyright


---

ANIMATIONS

Smooth only.

No flashy effects.

Use:

Fade

Slide

Blur

Parallax

Hover

Glow

Micro interactions

Everything should feel premium.


---

IMAGES

Only Ultra HD.

4K quality.

No pixelation.

Modern Web3 illustrations.

Professional renders.

Optimized loading.


---

USER EXPERIENCE

The user should immediately understand:

What Solaxy is

How Presale works

How to connect wallet

How to buy

How tokenomics work

How roadmap looks

Everything within 30 seconds.


---

REMOVE

Remove duplicated sections.

Remove fake numbers.

Remove placeholder content.

Remove inconsistent margins.

Remove unnecessary icons.

Remove random colors.

Remove unused components.

Remove confusing layout.


---

FINAL QUALITY TARGET

The website should look like it belongs to a Top 10 crypto project.

Comparable to premium Solana ecosystem products.

Modern.

Elegant.

Fast.

Responsive.

Accessible.

Production Ready.

Every section must be pixel-perfect.

Every animation must feel intentional.

Every piece of information must increase trust.

The final result should be polished enough to launch the Solaxy Presale without requiring another redesign.

Do not leave anything unfinished. Deliver a complete, production-ready website with clean architecture, maintainable code, and a cohesive design system.
